summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Style Weaver (MORPH) app - both backend APIs and frontend UI functionality tested successfully

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: GeminiException BadRequestError - litellm.BadRequestError when processing images
flaky_endpoints.workaround: API structure works correctly, error handling is proper, but AI image generation fails

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) returns correct MORPH message
Status check creation and retrieval endpoints work correctly
Generations endpoint returns empty array as expected
Error handling for missing data works properly
Homepage loads with correct MORPH branding and dark theme
Upload section displays with functional drag-and-drop zone
All 8 style category accordions work correctly (Sporty, Professional, Sassy & Bold, Casual Cool, Black Tie, Fantasy & Cosplay, Decades, Luxury & Designer)
Style preset selection works within each category
Custom prompt textarea accepts input correctly
Generate button state management works (disabled when no image/style, enabled when both present)
Frontend-backend integration shows proper loading states
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Emergent LLM integration issue in /api/restyle endpoint - GeminiException BadRequestError occurs during AI image generation. The API structure and error handling work correctly, but the actual AI processing fails. Check Emergent API key configuration, image format compatibility, or model parameters.
